message:
feat(fcp-mesh): add ExecutionPlanner for device-aware operation routing

Implements execution planner that produces deterministic ranked candidate
sets for routing operations to suitable mesh nodes. Features:

- CandidateNode with scored adjustments and decision reasons
- Connector availability and version compatibility checking
- Data locality scoring based on symbol presence
- Singleton writer lease enforcement
- Delegation mechanism for routing InvokeRequest to peers
- Explainable scoring with AdjustmentFactor tracking
- 10 deterministic tests covering all constraint types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
